posts.content: Biden DOJ targeted parents at school board meetings despite FBI, sheriffs' objections, memos show: https://justthenews.com/government/federal-agencies/afl
posts.content_html: Biden DOJ targeted parents at school board meetings despite FBI, sheriffs' objections, memos show: https://justthenews.com/government/federal-agencies/afl
posts.content_zh_cn: 备忘录显示：尽管联邦调查局和地方警长提出反对，拜登司法部仍将参加校董会会议的家长作为打击目标：https://justthenews.com/government/federal-agencies/afl
posts.content_zh_hk: 備忘錄顯示：儘管聯邦調查局及地方警長提出反對，拜登司法部仍將出席校董會會議的家長列為打擊目標：https://justthenews.com/government/federal-agencies/afl
posts.content_ko: 메모에 따르면, FBI와 지역 보안관들의 반대에도 불구하고 바이든 법무부는 교육위원회 회의에 참석한 학부모들을 표적으로 삼았다: https://justthenews.com/government/federal-agencies/afl

posts.content: FBI stopped alleged terror plot to attack UFC 250 event with drones and snipers, officials said: https://justthenews.com/government/security/fbi-stopped-alleged-terror-plot-attack-ufc-250-event-drones-and-snipers
posts.content_html: FBI stopped alleged terror plot to attack UFC 250 event with drones and snipers, officials said: https://justthenews.com/government/security/fbi-stopped-alleged-terror-plot-attack-ufc-250-event-drones-and-snipers
posts.content_zh_cn: 官员称，FBI挫败了一起据称企图袭击UFC 250赛事的恐怖阴谋，袭击手段包括无人机和狙击手：https://justthenews.com/government/security/fbi-stopped-alleged-terror-plot-attack-ufc-250-event-drones-and-snipers
posts.content_zh_hk: 官員稱，FBI挫敗了一宗據稱企圖襲擊UFC 250賽事的恐怖陰謀，襲擊手段包括無人機和狙擊手：https://justthenews.com/government/security/fbi-stopped-alleged-terror-plot-attack-ufc-250-event-drones-and-snipers
posts.content_ko: 당국자들에 따르면, FBI가 드론과 저격수를 동원해 UFC 250 대회를 공격하려 한 것으로 알려진 테러 음모를 저지했다: https://justthenews.com/government/security/fbi-stopped-alleged-terror-plot-attack-ufc-250-event-drones-and-snipers

이란은 핵무기를 결코 보유하지 않기로 동의했다! 또한 미국이 이란에 3억 달러를 지급한다는 이야기는 가짜 뉴스이며, 전부 그 멍청한 민주당원들이 퍼뜨린 것이다!!!

posts.content: Sadly, if you import people from Third World Countries, you quickly become a Third World Country — And there's not a thing you can do about it. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! President DONALD J. TRUMP
posts.content_html: Sadly, if you import people from Third World Countries, you quickly become a Third World Country — And there's not a thing you can do about it. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! President DONALD J. TRUMP
posts.content_zh_cn: 可悲的是，如果你从第三世界国家大量引入人口，你很快就会变成一个第三世界国家——而且对此你无能为力。让美国再次伟大！总统 唐纳德·J·特朗普
posts.content_zh_hk: 可悲的是，如果你從第三世界國家大量引入人口，你很快就會變成一個第三世界國家——而且對此你無能為力。讓美國再次偉大！總統 唐納德·J·特朗普
posts.content_ko: 안타깝게도, 제3세계 국가들로부터 사람들을 대거 받아들이면, 당신의 나라도 곧 제3세계 국가가 됩니다 — 그리고 이에 대해 당신이 할 수 있는 일은 아무것도 없습니다. 미국을 다시 위대하게! 도널드 J. 트럼프 대통령
